scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,realtime -c magenta,cyan "npm run dev -w @photobooth/web" "npm run dev -w @photobooth/realtime"
scripts.dev:https: concurrently -n web,realtime -c magenta,cyan "npm run dev:https -w @photobooth/web" "npm run dev:https -w @photobooth/realtime"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @photobooth/shared && npm run build -w @photobooth/web && npm run build -w @photobooth/realtime
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @photobooth/web && npm run lint -w @photobooth/realtime
scripts.test: npm run test -w @photobooth/web && npm run test -w @photobooth/realtime
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build && npm run check:lines
